description: CompositionCharcoal coloured polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton with multi-coloured stripes, has a ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, branding embroidered on both sides of the chest and a vented hem FitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsCelebrate life in style with this charcoal coloured striped polo t-shirt from wrangler. The short ribbed sleeves sit snug on well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps your fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and suede shoes or shorts and sandals for unparalleled cool.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
